about_text: I am a freelancer, Frontend developer, based in Novorossiysk, Russia. I enjoy creating modern, responsive, and intuitive websites and applications that turn your ideas into successful digital products.
about_me_text: Hi! I specialize in creating engaging, responsive, and accessible digital experiences for all types of users. I transform ideas into clear and effective websites and apps. My key work standards are: Pixel-perfect layout: I accurately transfer designs from mockups to live code. Interactivity and dynamics: I bring interfaces to life through smooth animation and fast response. Totally adaptive: I optimize websites for any screen size. Clean design under the hood: I write structured code that is easy to maintain and scale.
